/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/PGR_Semestral.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/PGR_Semestral.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PGR_Semestral.dir/camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PGR_Semestral.dir/meshgeometry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PGR_Semestral.dir/modeltexture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PGR_Semestral.dir/objects.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PGR_Semestral.dir/render.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PGR_Semestral.dir/shaders.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PGR_Semestral.dir/terrain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PGR_Semestral.dir/gamestate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PGR_Semestral.dir/noise.cpp.o -o PGR_Semestral   -L/home/martul3ns/projects/OpenGL-Game-Engine/src/libs/freeglut/lib  -L/home/martul3ns/projects/OpenGL-Game-Engine/src/libs/assimp/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/martul3ns/projects/OpenGL-Game-Engine/src/libs/freeglut/lib:/home/martul3ns/projects/OpenGL-Game-Engine/src/libs/assimp/lib /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libGLU.so /home/martul3ns/projects/OpenGL-Game-Engine/src/libs/glew/lib/libGLEW.a -lglut -lassimp -lGL -lGLU -lm -lpthread -ldl
